creator: osa@FreeBSD.org.ru
text:
upgrade postfix to 20010228-pl08
	It containes 2 fixes for smtpd command log memory exhaustion bug.
	For more information look at postfix-announce maillist.

Fix: Close http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=32000, becase
this is superset.

Apply following patch.
